notes: userId, externalSubId, externalCustId, changeReason deu JsonIgnore va khong nhan tu FE.
isTrial = true se bypass yeu cau billingCycle va set status = Trial.
Neu plan tra phi ma isTrial = false thi billingCycle la bat buoc.
Response/handler dung UTC today neu startDate bi omit.
status va billingCycle serialise thanh so, khong phai string.
planName/planDisplayName uu tien snapshot truoc, sau do moi fallback ve plan hien tai.
externalSubId/externalCustId co the xuat hien trong response neu du lieu server co, nhung FE khong set duoc qua create/update route.
Neu omit effectiveDate, handler dung ngay hien tai UTC.
changeType serialise thanh so.
oldPlanName/newPlanName duoc join theo plan lookup hien tai va co the null neu plan cu khong con.
Duoc tra boi GET /api/subscriptions/plans va dung cung model voi PlansController.
status serialise thanh so.
POST /api/subscriptions/{id}/payments tao transaction Pending local, khong tu dong tao PayOS checkout.
Body co the omit hoan toan; controller cho phep empty body.
replaceValues = true => overwrite toan bo metric cho period.
replaceValues = false => cong don vao gia tri hien co cua cung period.

endpoints.name: GetSubscription
problemCases: 404 ProblemDetails neu subscription khong ton tai.
404 ProblemDetails neu current user khong phai admin va subscription thuoc user khac.
notes: Ownership rule duoc thuc hien bang cach tra ve 404, khong phai 403.

endpoints.name: GetPlansForSubscriptionScreens
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu isActive khong parse duoc.
notes: Route nay duplicate logic plan list de phuc vu FE subscription screens.
Mac dinh chi tra plan active.

endpoints.name: GetCurrentSubscriptionByUser
problemCases: 404 ProblemDetails neu user do khong co current subscription status Trial/Active/PastDue.
notes: Neu current token khong phai admin, backend ignore userId tren path va dung current user.
Neu admin gui Guid.Empty tren path, backend cung fallback current user.

endpoints.name: GetCurrentSubscriptionMe
problemCases: 404 ProblemDetails neu current user khong co current subscription status Trial/Active/PastDue.
notes: Day la route don gian nhat de FE refresh subscription sau khi mua goi.

endpoints.name: CreateSubscription
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu body sai shape hoac vi pham DataAnnotations.
400 ProblemDetails neu body null, plan inactive, billingCycle thieu cho paid non-trial, hoac chu ky yeu cau khong duoc plan ho tro.
404 ProblemDetails neu planId khong ton tai.
notes: Controller inject model.userId = current user truoc khi dispatch command.
Handler lay latest subscription cua current user neu da ton tai va update no, nhung action van tra 201 Created.
isTrial = true se tao/cap nhat status = Trial va set TrialEndsAt, EndDate, NextBillingDate = ngay ket thuc trial.

endpoints.name: UpdateSubscription
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu body sai shape hoac vi pham DataAnnotations.
400 ProblemDetails neu body null, plan inactive, billingCycle khong hop le, hoac co gang doi owner.
404 ProblemDetails neu subscription khong ton tai, user khong duoc so huu subscription, hoac planId khong ton tai.
notes: Controller doc subscription truoc de enforce ownership va tu gan model.userId = existingSubscription.userId.
Update luon ghi them 1 dong history voi changeType Created/Upgraded/Downgraded/Reactivated tuy context.

endpoints.name: CancelSubscription
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu body JSON sai shape.
404 ProblemDetails neu subscription khong ton tai hoac current user khong so huu subscription.
notes: Neu subscription da status Cancelled, command return som va controller van tra snapshot hien tai voi 200.
Cancel set AutoRenew = false, NextBillingDate = null, TrialEndsAt = null.

endpoints.name: GetSubscriptionHistory
problemCases: 404 ProblemDetails neu subscription khong ton tai hoac current user khong so huu subscription.
notes: Response co the la 200 [] neu subscription hop le nhung chua co history.

endpoints.name: GetSubscriptionPayments
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu query status khong parse duoc.
404 ProblemDetails neu subscription khong ton tai hoac current user khong so huu subscription.
notes: Khong co pagination.
Admin co the xem payment transactions cua subscription bat ky neu vuot qua ownership precheck.

endpoints.name: AddPaymentTransaction
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu body sai shape.
400 ProblemDetails neu snapshot/plan amount resolve ra <= 0.
404 ProblemDetails neu subscription khong ton tai hoac current user khong so huu subscription.
notes: Action nay la helper tao pending transaction local, khong tao PayOS checkout link.
Neu body omit hoan toan, backend van tao duoc transaction moi neu amount hop le.
Neu externalTxnId hoac providerRef bi trung, handler tra lai transaction da ton tai thay vi tao moi.
Location header tro toi route hien tai chua co GET endpoint corresponding.

endpoints.name: GetUsageTracking
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu periodStart/periodEnd khong parse duoc.
notes: Neu current token khong phai admin, backend ignore userId tren path va doc usage cua current user.
Filter la PeriodStart >= query.periodStart va PeriodEnd <= query.periodEnd.
Khong co validation start <= end o route GET.

endpoints.name: UpsertUsageTracking
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu body sai shape hoac DataAnnotations fail.
400 ProblemDetails neu periodStart > periodEnd hoac co metric am.
notes: Neu current token khong phai admin, backend ignore userId tren path va update usage cho current user.
Response duoc query lai theo chinh model.periodStart/model.periodEnd, vi vay thuong la mang 1 phan tu.
Route nay khong validate nguoi dung co current subscription hay khong; no thao tac truc tiep tren UsageTracking.

runtimeRules: Create/Update subscription su dung enum so cho BillingCycle, SubscriptionStatus, ChangeType, PaymentStatus.
POST /api/subscriptions co the update latest subscription cua current user thay vi tao row moi.
isTrial = true se bo qua billing validation va tao status Trial, TrialEndsAt = now + TrialDays, EndDate = NextBillingDate = ngay ket thuc trial.
isTrial = false va plan free cho phep billingCycle null; subscription active ngay voi EndDate/NextBillingDate = null.
Current subscription query chi nhin status Trial/Active/PastDue va lay ban ghi moi nhat theo CreatedDateTime desc.
Ownership cho non-admin duoc map thanh 404 o GET/PUT/cancel/history/payment routes.
POST /api/subscriptions/{id}/payments mac dinh tao PaymentMethod=payos, Provider=PAYOS, Status=Pending.
AddPaymentTransaction dedupe theo externalTxnId trong cung subscription hoac providerRef global PAYOS.
Usage upsert dung unique pair UserId + PeriodStart + PeriodEnd de update/create.
replaceValues = false cua usage se cong don tung metric vao ban ghi hien co.

unsupportedPaidCycle400.title: Bad Request
unsupportedPaidCycle400.detail: Goi cuoc nay khong ho tro thanh toan theo nam.
unsupportedPaidCycle400.message: Goi cuoc nay khong ho tro thanh toan theo nam.

relatedNotes: Neu FE can mua goi, uu tien PaymentsController thay vi tu goi create subscription + add payment transaction thu cong.
Neu FE can man hinh admin usage, can hien ro userId path se bi ignore voi token non-admin.
Can parse cac enum numeric ve label client-side de UI de doc hon.
